Video.summary: Eric and Lisa are divorced and Eric is now dating Keri. Both Eric and Keri feel like Lisa is stalking them by sending him text messages and naked pictures. Then, Christopher has been unable to trust Olivia and thinks she may be cheating again.
Video.title: She's Stalking Us!

Video.summary: Melinda says that she should be given custody of Tiffany's son because Tiffany is allowing her boyfriends to physically abuse the boy. Tiffany swears that the abuse Is coming from the boys father Scott and not from her boyfriends.
Video.title: Results Reveal The Truth

Video.summary: William received a strange voicemail and became convinced that his girlfriend Jo was drugging him and sneaking men into their house to cheat. Plus, Donovan believes Lacara has been cheating, but she says she confessed so the accusations would stop!
Video.title: Crazy Allegations, Shocking Results!

Video.summary: Ijwaun and Terrika are back for another DNA test; Molly and Kendall seek DNA results.
Video.title: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Image.alt: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Video.summary: Heather is 17 years old and she says her boyfriend Anthony is the father of her child. But Anthony thinks his brother, Tracy is the father. Then, Roxana believes her two-year-old nephew was beaten by his mother Kyesha.
Video.title: Did He Abuse My Son?

Video.summary: At seventeen, Dimitrius has already had three children and now four additional women claim to be pregnant with his baby. Then Ethel and her daughters need Steve's help to right their wrongs and get their family back on track.
Video.title: Steve's Had Enough

Video.summary: Matt accuses Ashely of cheating and physically checks her for signs of infidelity; Justin doubts that he is really the father of Shaitassia's child.
Video.title: DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant

Image.alt: DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant
DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant
DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant

Video.summary: A mom, addicted to PCP, repeatedly abuses her daughter. She even forced her daughter to lie about her abusive boyfriend just so he could get out of jail.
Video.title: My Mom Made Me Lie

Video.summary: Roxanne and Andrew have 2 children together, but she is cracking from the physical abuse. Andrew says he’s worried she’s been cheating on him and doesn’t know if the children are his! Can Steve’s test results save their relationship?
Video.title: Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage

Image.alt: Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage
Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage
Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage

Video.summary: Fists fly when Cee Cee proposes to her boyfriend on the show; old flames come out of the woodwork to profess their love for Summer; Jon confesses a shocking secret to the woman he wants to marry.
Video.title: Half-Baked Proposals

Video.summary: Whitney learns what really happens during her children's father's late-night sessions at the recording studio; new mom Coralena is engaged in a war between her fiance and her friend; Denzel's girlfriends fight over him.
Video.title: Big Booty Mistakes

Video.summary: Jeda says that she's desperately in love with Steven. They were engaged until her sister Kayla stepped in and stole her man. Then, Ashley says that things in her life would be great if it wasn't for her boyfriend Phil's ex girlfriend Shanna.
Video.title: Sabotaged!

Video.summary: Jon is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating on her with her brother! Next Kelly will dump her boyfriend for her secret lover, Bart. Then Malikah will tell her fiancé that she's had a secret lover for the past 3 years!
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!

Video.summary: Arianna learns that her girlfriend has another on the side; Anthony says he made a mistake in cheating on his girlfriend, but the other woman will stop at nothing to be with him.
Video.title: In Your Face Mistresses

Video.summary: Fritz will do anything to help his cousin out - even sleep with his fiancee! Bradley's mom and wife confront him over his affair with his mom's doppelganger!
Video.title: Strange Secret Affairs!

Video.summary: Tony confesses to his girlfriend that he is cheating on her with a transsexual. Mary confronts her transsexual roommate Shortee. Next, Limont confronts his one-night stand.
Video.title: Tales of the She-Males

Video.summary: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has lo reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.
Video.title: Weddings...Crashed!

Video.summary: Are you looking for fast cash but feel you don't have the skills well our guests today have started a family business…they're selling sex and they're ready to reveal their secrets!
Video.title: The Hooker Family Hour

Video.summary: Angelo is here to tell his girlfriend that he's a woman. Next, Mikey brought his girlfriend here to tell her that he's been cheating on her. But she has surprise of her own. Later Jennifer feels she must tell her lover the truth about her sexuality
Video.title: I'm Lying to my Lover

Video.summary: Justin says that Ashley's so overbearing and protective that it drove him to cheat on her with her lifelong friend Erica. Then, Tina is here to confront her sister Ruthie for cheating with her man Tony.
Video.title: Crazy In Love

Video.summary: Melina admits that she sold-out her own daughter and doesn't believe Justin is the father of Brittney's child. Is Brittney truly cheating, or is Melina making up lies because she's jealous of her daughter?
Video.title: My Daughter's A Cheater!

Video.summary: Nadia and Nina are feuding sisters that haven't spoken to each other in four years. Their mother Denise is caught in the middle and desperately wants to reunite her family. These siblings want the lie detector to clear it up.
Video.title: Did My Sister Sleep With My Dead Husband?

Image.alt: Did My Sister Sleep With My Dead Husband?
Did My Sister Sleep With My Dead Husband?
Did My Sister Sleep With My Dead Husband?

Video.summary: Shawntell says she has every reason to believe her boyfriend Lionel has been sleeping with other women. Then, Chasity thought her and Derrick were in newlywed bliss until she found another woman’s clothes in their laundry.
Video.title: Is My Newlywed Husband Having An Affair?

Image.alt: Is My Newlywed Husband Having An Affair?
Is My Newlywed Husband Having An Affair?
Is My Newlywed Husband Having An Affair?

Video.summary: Kelly suspects that Eugene has been sleeping with other women because he gave her an STD. Then, Demetria says her family might be torn apart if the lie detector test proves that her husband and father of two children, Abrey, has been unfaithful.
Video.title: Is My Fiance Having An Affair With My Best Friend?

Image.alt: Is My Fiance Having An Affair With My Best Friend?
Is My Fiance Having An Affair With My Best Friend?
Is My Fiance Having An Affair With My Best Friend?

Video.summary: Savannah claims Mitch denied being her father because of his alcoholism, violent ways and her marriage to an African American. Mitch claims that her mother specifically told him that Savannah is not his child. Is Mitch the father?
Video.title: I've Found The Man I Think Is My Dad!

Image.alt: I've Found The Man I Think Is My Dad!
I've Found The Man I Think Is My Dad!
I've Found The Man I Think Is My Dad!

Video.summary: Nikki fears that the love of her life Mike is a lying, dirty cheater. She suspects that he gave her an STD. And later, Messina surprised her husband with a threesome with Meagan, and now Meagan is pregnant.
Video.title: After The Threesome...Is My Husband Her Baby's Dad?

Image.alt: After The Threesome...Is My Husband Her Baby's Dad?
After The Threesome...Is My Husband Her Baby's Dad?
After The Threesome...Is My Husband Her Baby's Dad?

Video.summary: Kiesh has caught her boyfriend Twon cheating before, but doesn’t have enough evidence to prove that he’s been sneaking around with her best friend! Then, Glenn loves his exotic dancer fiancée Kim, but suspects that she is doing more than stripping!
Video.title: I Need The Truth! Is My Fiancee Leading A Secret Double Sex Life?

Image.alt: I Need The Truth! Is My Fiancee Leading A Secret Double Sex Life?
I Need The Truth! Is My Fiancee Leading A Secret Double Sex Life?
I Need The Truth! Is My Fiancee Leading A Secret Double Sex Life?

Video.summary: Tyrone claims Rona's mother was the neighborhood "hot girl", so he doesn't believe that she is his daughter. And later, Rebecca wants to find out if the rumors are true that 19- year old Tommy is truly her father Randy's son.
Video.title: I've Told You For 37 Years I'm Not Your Father!

Image.alt: I've Told You For 37 Years I'm Not Your Father!
I've Told You For 37 Years I'm Not Your Father!
I've Told You For 37 Years I'm Not Your Father!

Video.summary: Mysti thought she found her ideal man in Mark until she started finding evidence that made her suspect he has been cheating. Then, Scott thinks his wife, Stacy, is cheating on him because he found fingerprint bruises on her inner thigh.
Video.title: I Consider You My Dad, I'm Praying You're Not Cheating On My Mom

Image.alt: I Consider You My Dad, I'm Praying You're Not Cheating On My Mom
I Consider You My Dad, I'm Praying You're Not Cheating On My Mom
I Consider You My Dad, I'm Praying You're Not Cheating On My Mom

Video.summary: Alexus claims that Michael is the father of her child, but she doesn't know that he is engaged. Later, Shanika's mom Rannie and her baby's father Oscar are scared for her life. They fear that Shanika has been prostituting and robbing men for money.
Video.title: Will My Sex Secret Tear My Family Apart

Image.alt: Will My Sex Secret Tear My Family Apart
Will My Sex Secret Tear My Family Apart
Will My Sex Secret Tear My Family Apart

Video.summary: Robert thinks Kimberly might have been pregnant before she moved in with him. Is he really her child’s father? Later, Debra spent her entire life believing that Kenny was her father. But a relative revealed that Kenny confessed paternity doubts!
Video.title: 33 Years of Lies…Are You My Father Or Not?

Image.alt: 33 Years of Lies…Are You My Father Or Not?
33 Years of Lies…Are You My Father Or Not?
33 Years of Lies…Are You My Father Or Not?

Video.summary: Alicia dated John for 2 years before finding out he was a male exotic dancer named Temptation. Then April, who was born female, became Logan while she was married to Tom. During the show, Tom said that he did not want to continue being with Logan.
Video.title: Trisha Updates!

Video.summary: Barbie suspects that her boyfriend Jose has been cheating. Barbie says she can’t ignore the signs any longer and today she wants to know the truth! And later, Jenn says Eddie needs to act his age and stop denying their child.
Video.title: I'm 22…I'l Prove This 52-Year-Old Man Is My Baby's Dad

Image.alt: I'm 22…I'l Prove This 52-Year-Old Man Is My Baby's Dad
I'm 22…I'l Prove This 52-Year-Old Man Is My Baby's Dad
I'm 22…I'l Prove This 52-Year-Old Man Is My Baby's Dad
